title: Piglin Economy
description: Piglin Economy expands Piglin Trading with their own coins called "Coinks"
body:
**Piglin Economy expands Piglin Trading with their own coins called "Coinks"**

![Gold Coink](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2073fee4662e097b7d8bc98f8be283fb76a03f06_0.webp)

**Features:**

- Gold Coinks (can be crafted with a stonecutter or traded for at a banker villager)
- Emerald Coinks (Universal Currency, can be traded for at a banker villager)
- Banker (New Villager)
- Currency Conversion
